examples: I've got a job as a shorthand typist.
I gained a shorthand and typing diploma at evening classes.
He taught himself shorthand to get an even better job later as a court stenographer and as a reporter in Parliament.
Weak from scurvy and rheumatism, Sneden scratched away in his shorthand diary, obsessively documenting everything he witnessed.
"My judge felt all women lawyers should take shorthand and should type, " Roberts recalled.
